title: narcissus jonquilla proles juncifolius
intro: Narcissus jonquilla proles juncifolius, also known as the Dwarf Jonquil, is a subspecies of the Jonquil flower, a type of narcissus that is characterized by its sweetly fragrant, trumpet-shaped flowers and narrow, grass-like foliage. The medicinal properties of the Dwarf Jonquil include its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of the Dwarf Jonquil include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve respiratory health due to its expectorant properties. The herbal preparations of the Dwarf Jonquil often include using its flowers and leaves in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
